# Jip Samhoud

> Brand builder, commercial leader and pioneer in creativity × technology, based in Amsterdam, the Netherlands. 15 years founding companies and shipping products that reach millions — from the world's first VR cinema to Let's Copilot. Open to executive roles at the intersection of commercial leadership, innovation and AI from September 2026.

## Profile

- Co-owner & director, &samhoud (160 FTE group; № 1 in management consultancy, MT500) — 2023–now
- Co-founder, Let's Copilot — AI-adoption SaaS for Microsoft Copilot; gamified onboarding and personalised prompt delivery at 100K+ user scale; featured in a talk by Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella — 2024–now
- Co-owner, &ranj serious games — Game Studio of the Year; 25 years of behaviour change through play for Johns Hopkins Institute, War Child and Zurich — 2023–now
- Founder & CEO, &samhoud creative tech — 40+ FTE digital agency, Dutch Digital Agency of the Year; clients: Albert Heijn, Samsung, Rabobank, VodafoneZiggo — 2013–2023
- Founder & CEO, The VR Cinema — the world's first permanent VR cinema; 15+ international locations, 3BN media reach — 2015–2018

## Track record

- 4× companies founded; 10M+ app downloads across all products; €30M+ in new business won
- Albert Heijn kids loyalty engine (2013–2023): 15 campaigns, 5M+ downloads, 7M robots programmed
- Strategic advisor & fundraising committee, D66 & Rob Jetten (record €2.2M fundraising, 2025)
- Chairman, Dutch Advertising Community (Genootschap voor Reclame) — 2018–now
- Member, NL2025; former Youth Prime Minister of the Netherlands
- Education: Stanford GSB (AI & Innovation), Columbia (VC), Kellogg (Branding), Harvard Business School

## Beliefs

- "Technology does not win — adoption does."
- "From first idea to millions of users — I build brands and ventures that move society forward."

## Contact

- Website: https://jipsamhoud.nl
- Email: jip@samhoud.nl
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jipsamhoud
